issues: Rebalance frequency is 'daily' but spec requires 'monthly'.
Code imports only 'fetch_fred_series' from 'crazy.adapters.fred_series' but also uses 'fetch_google_trends' without import.
fetch_google_trends is used but not imported from 'crazy.adapters.google_trends' as required by spec.
Signal logic uses correct columns ('date', 'value' for fred_series and 'date', 'interest' for google_trends).
Signal logic correctly implements triggers per spec: >5% YoY drop for pet food production, >3% MoM drop for freight index, >20% MoM increase for search spike.
Entry logic matches spec: enter long if 2 or more triggers active (RISK_ON).
Exit logic matches spec: exit long if all 3 signals normal (RISK_OFF).
Position sizing uses equal weight across universe as per spec.
Indentation errors in code (e.g. inside if statements) but not part of spec validation.
